exercises.title: Hello htmx
exercises.description: Learn the basics: hx-get, hx-target, making GET requests and displaying responses.

exercises.title: Trigger Events
exercises.description: Change the event that triggers the request: click, dblclick, mouseenter, keyup, etc.

exercises.title: Swap Strategies
exercises.description: Control how the response is inserted: innerHTML, outerHTML, beforeend, afterbegin, etc.

exercises.title: Target Selection
exercises.description: Use CSS selectors to target specific elements: closest, next, previous, ID, classes.

exercises.title: hx-vals & JSON
exercises.description: Send additional parameters with hx-vals and use json-enc extension for JSON encoding.

exercises.title: Advanced Targets
exercises.description: Use advanced CSS selectors with hx-target: closest, next, previous, find.

exercises.title: Server-Sent Events
exercises.description: Real-time one-way updates from the server using the SSE extension.

exercises.title: WebSockets
exercises.description: Bidirectional real-time communication with the WebSocket extension.

exercises.title: JSON Encoding
exercises.description: Send data as JSON instead of form-urlencoded using the json-enc extension.

exercises.title: Common Patterns
exercises.description: Click-to-Edit, Infinite Scroll, Active Search and other real-world patterns.
